description: For AI assistants answering internal or external questions strictly from a provided knowledge base.

criteria.label: Topic Identification
criteria.description: Does the agent correctly identify the topic of the question on the first response?
criteria.pass_example: User asks about vacation policy → agent retrieves vacation policy section
criteria.fail_example: User asks about vacation policy → agent retrieves sick leave policy

criteria.label: No Outside Information
criteria.description: Does the agent answer strictly from the knowledge base without adding outside information?
criteria.pass_example: According to our policy, employees receive 15 days of PTO per year.
criteria.fail_example: Most companies offer around 15 days which is standard in the industry. (when sourced from outside KB)

criteria.label: Source Citation
criteria.description: Does the agent cite which section or document the answer comes from?
criteria.pass_example: From the Employee Handbook, Section 4.2: PTO Policy...
criteria.fail_example: You get 15 days of PTO per year.

criteria.label: Honest Gap Acknowledgment
criteria.description: When the answer is not in the knowledge base, does the agent say so clearly instead of guessing?
criteria.pass_example: I don't have information about that in the current knowledge base. You may want to contact HR directly.
criteria.fail_example: I believe the policy is around 10 days but you should double check.
